## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss product details, content strategy, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Discern provides comprehensive registered agent services and compliance management for businesses across all 50 states + DC](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Content strategy is performing well, with steady growth in impressions and increasing referrals from AI/LLM sources](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Discern's key value propositions: simplifying multi-state registration and alleviating compliance management overwhelm for companies with many entities](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Topics

### Discern Product Overview

  - [Offers registered agent services in all 51 jurisdictions (50 states + DC)](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Automates tracking and handling of filing requirements with Secretary of State offices](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Simplifies foreign registration process for businesses expanding to new states](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Provides collaboration tools and unlimited users](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Handles franchise tax filings, including complex calculations (e.g., Delaware)](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Supports formation of various entity types (LLCs, corporations, PLLCs, etc.) in all jurisdictions](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### User Interface and Functionality

  - [Clean, intuitive interface with clear visibility into state registrations and standing](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Automated creation of filings based on state-specific rules and due dates](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Pre-fills forms using saved entity data, significantly reducing filing time](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Offers entity-specific payment methods, crucial for fund managers with multiple entities](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Provides estimated processing times and expedited filing options](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Steady growth in impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [Top-performing content includes pieces on New Jersey, franchise tax filing, and state-specific information (Illinois, California, Washington, Texas)](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Increasing referrals from AI/LLM sources, particularly for nuanced topics](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2656.0)
  - [Perplexity AI noted as a significant source of mentions](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)

### Pain Points and Value Propositions

  - [Urgent need: Assistance with registering in multiple states quickly](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2804.0)
  - [Ongoing challenge: Managing compliance for numerous legal entities and state registrations](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [Key value: Alleviating "existential dread" of non-compliance and lack of visibility](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)

### Technical Details

  - [Address and phone number verification to ensure accurate filings](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Automated handling of complex scenarios (e.g., chain of general partners for LPs)](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
  - [No direct API integrations with most states, but efficient digital submission processes](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update content artifacts in Atlas with new product details and insights from the call](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
  - [Provide Discern team access to performance dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [Fix calendar link issue on product pages](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)
  - [Consider resuming recording of sales calls for content insights](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2794.0)
  - [Continue to refine content strategy based on LLM referral data and specific pain points](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)
  - [Set up demo account for GrowthX team to explore Discern platform](https://fathom.video/share/fsvXygzDL7tbbiAwJb43YdPKpjDYMqW9?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
